name: OCULAR THERAPEUTIX, INC
summary: PART I We are an integrated biopharmaceutical company committed to redefining the retina experience. AXPAXLI, also known as OTX-TKI, our investigational product candidate for retinal disease, is an axitinib intravitreal hydrogel based on our ELUTYX proprietary bioresorbable hydrogel-based formulation technology. AXPAXLI is currently being evaluated in a Phase 3 registrational program for wet age-related macular degeneration, or wet AMD, which we refer to as the SOL program. AXPAXLI is currently ...
